heading: Employing another person as managing or operating agent
label: 58103 Employing another person as managing or operating agent

children.text: employ another person as the managing or operating agent of the operator; or
charter a vessel, on which an operating-differential subsidy is to be paid, for operation by another person.

children.heading: .—Applicability of Provisions to Charterer
children.label: b .—Applicability of Provisions to Charterer
children.text: If a charter prohibited by this section is made, the person operating the chartered vessel is subject to all the provisions of this subtitle and the operating-differential subsidy program, including limitations of profits and salaries.
